posts.text:
Another day, we'll discuss why this is happening. 

The effective altruists/TESCREAL bundle billionaires have infiltrated the labor movement & journalism, offering fellowshipsand 💰 like they invested ridiculous amounts of 💰into these companies claiming to build machine gods.

Bernie's ad for Claude shows us the machine as an all knowing god answering all his questions, which implicitly argues that workers are getting displaced because this machine does their jobs much better than them, not because executives are pushing it down everyone's throats.

we publicly made a stink about "safety" even though we were the ones who participated in a $100m military challenge on building autonomous weapons. Whatever don't talk about that. We need to have a machine god and we're the only ethical company building it!

Anthropic's talking point is: "We're ethical but we're building a machine god & who knows what machine gods can do to humanity." But you'd rather have us build this machine god than anyone else in the world. Sure we were the first to partner with Palantir & the military, but...

because workers are going to be replaced by their machine god that will do our jobs so much better than us. Investors want to hear the talking point of these machine gods displacing workers because, well that's how they make money.

A company amassing billions saying they'll at once save us from evil super intelligent machines and building the benevolent super intelligent machine that will solve all of our problems. They're so worried about people not getting "reskilled"...

Here, Bernie is literally creating a Claude ad, showing the system as an all knowing being that answers all of his questions. An ad for Anthropic, a company claiming that they can't even confidently say that "Claude isn't conscious".

Remember when Altman schmoozed them just a couple of years ago and all these newspapers had headlines of him "begging" to be regulated and hailing him as an Oppenheimer figure who is so worried about his own creation 🙄

time.com/7267797/ai-leaders-…

Someone said it's like telling you to buy Camels instead of Marlboros, while claiming to fight tobacco companies. If any politician parrots the talking points of a CEO whose company is on a funding round, even in speaking about the harms of AI systems, you should be worried.

Amodei positions Anthropic as the ethical alternative to OpenAI like OpenAI positioned itself as the ethical alternative to Google in 2015 & everyone ate it up. An article from then says Muskrat, Thiel, Altman et al. founded an "altruistic AI venture" 🙄
bbc.com/news/technology-3508…
Well my tweets have been suppressed on this Nazi platform for a while so we'll see how this goes.

Bernie bros came for me on this Nazi platform when I quote tweeted his Calude ad saying, "at this point, Bernie’s job seems to be lobbying for Anthropic."  

Lets elaborate. 

Bernie has been repeating Dario Amodei's talking points for a while now, even quote tweeting him.🧵


Sen. Bernie Sanders (@SenSanders)

I spoke to Anthropic’s AI agent Claude about AI collecting massive amounts of personal data and how that information is being used to violate our privacy rights.

What an AI agent says abo
The bros on Muskrat’s platform make me understand how the dudes were “undecided” between Trump and Bernie.

At this point, Bernie’s job seems to be lobbying for Anthropic.


Sen. Bernie Sanders (@SenSanders)

I spoke to Anthropic’s AI agent Claude about AI collecting massive amounts of personal data and how that information is being used to violate our privacy rights.

What an AI agent says about the dangers of AI is shocking and should wake us up.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/SenSanders/status/2034715260259557597#m

This is why @xriskology & I call them the TESCREAL bundle. It doesn't matter whether they're effective altruists or not, this is a family squabble in a family we want to stay away from, like a squabble between the Brits or French during the scramble for Africa.
